Since 2018

Built on the Upstate,
Yard by Yard

What started as one mowing route in Greenville has grown into a team trusted by 695+ homeowners across 15 communities. Our mission hasn't changed: make every yard look its absolute best, every single visit.

0 +

Happy Homeowners

What Drives Us

Our Values

Consistency

We show up on schedule, every time. Your lawn doesn't take days off — neither do we.

Precision

Every edge defined, every line straight, every detail attended to. We treat your yard like we live there.

Transparency

Clear pricing, honest recommendations. We tell you what your lawn needs — not what costs the most.

Community

Born in the Upstate, built for the Upstate. We know these neighborhoods because we're part of them.

Our Journey

Growing With Greenville

2018

First Yard

Started with a single residential mowing route in downtown Greenville.

2019

Growing Roots

Expanded to Simpsonville and Mauldin with a dedicated two-person crew.

2021

200+ Clients

Added hedge trimming, weed treatment and seasonal packages to the lineup.

2023

500+ Homeowners

Reached 15 communities across the Upstate with a fleet of professional equipment.

2026

695+ and Counting

Now one of the most trusted names in Greenville landscaping with 55+ active annual contracts.

"We don't just mow lawns — we build the kind of curb appeal that makes you proud to pull into your driveway."

The Greenville Landscaping Team
